review_title: Just give Hevo a try, you will not be disappointed.
description: Overall, it has been great. We have cutdown on our Snowflake ingestion cost by 5x. Our data is synced in a timely manner, and so far the data has been accurate. What more could you ask for in an ELT product?
author: Wicks J.
pros: The value for money just can't be beaten. We achieved a 5x cheaper saving by moving to Hevo. It is also easy and simple to setup data flows if you just doing ELT, and not ETL. We managed to setup almost 150 new sources within 3 weeks. Their product support and dev teams are simply unbelievably good. Issues are fixed quickly, and even product enhancements can be made on request, which get done very 1quickly. Within 2 weeks.
cons: Sometimes the historical syncs in standard can take a few days to complete, but the new Edge syncs Hevo have added to their product are very fast and make up for the slower Standard syncs. There are some gotcha's you need to watch out for, for example if you restart an object in the pipeline means it restarts the entire tables ingestion again from the beginning, it's like a full historical sync, so just be aware of that.

review_title: Hevo - a one stop solution to push data from multitude of sources into DB
description: We have been using it for over 2 years now, and never considered exploring other options as it works so well and is decently priced.
author: Shashank S.
pros: It was very simple and easy to understand and use. It helps transfering data to DB very easy and efficient
cons: Pipelines do not synchronize as per the set schedule and they have stopped activation (pushing query result to google sheets)

author: Abhinav R.
pros: Ease of use with quite many features . Hevo has come a long way since we started using
cons: TAT is relatively lower on default support. Requires frequent escalation

description: It serves all our need. All problems are fixed quickly. The onboarding was friendly. The interface is eaasy to use. Overall very satisfied
author: Simon E.
pros: The amount of pipelines and the fast and friendly customer service
cons: From time to time a pipline breaks or doesnt run completly and i notice to late

review_title: Give it a shot, you will like it!
author: Pratik C.
pros: Hevo is super easy to use. I can rely on Hevo for executing my data pipelines without interruptions. I love the fact that it has so many REST API connectors.
cons: Honestly, there is nothing much to dislike about Hevo. The only thing which the platform could improve on is a little bit more transparency in pipeline progress.

review_title: Best for Salesforce connector ETL and Free
description: I'm newbie, but I'm ready connect to salesforce CRM with strigthforward
author: Samuel C.
pros: I like the UI is easy and intuitive, for me the Salesforce connector was piece of cake.
cons: There is a huge free trial, if you have an startup and you want a robust ETL hevo is the solution.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Very Friendly. 95% of use cases are covered.
author: Ajay K.
pros: Ease of Access Easy Installation User Friendly
cons: Non Availability of Itunes App Store for downloading reviews data.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: How easy it is to configure it, and how helpful email support is Ans the way it can handle large volumes of data
cons: Visibility of the data If there is a multi-step system producing a bug, it is hard to track down where it went wrong

description: We've used Hevo as part of our data warehouse infrastructure for 5 years and it's been stable and consistent. We've been quite happy with the product and support.
author: Mike S.
pros: Hevo is easy to use and quite reliable for ingestion and reverse ETL to Salesforce.
cons: The future of support for rETL functions - Hevo Activate - is unclear.

review_title: Best no/low code data pipeline tool on the market for the $$
description: We have been with Hevo for a few years and have nothing but good things to report.
author: David C.
pros: Incredibly easy to use and the service has always been top notch and fast!!
cons: It wasn't always intuitive at first , but once you get used to it it's perfect. With customer care , it is never hard.

description: It was good, I was able to learn something new from hevodata.
author: Mehul S.
pros: It provides support anytime whatever the issue is, I am glad to share my feedback.
cons: They should give the option for javascript for transformation script.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: First time Building ETLs with Hevo
author: Shubham B.
pros: Extremely Easy to build pipelines from various data sources. Easy to debug and resync in case of failures.
cons: L2 Documentation for certain data sources seem to be a bit outdated.

author: Akshay P.
pros: ease of use, lot of end to end management is done by the platform.
cons: could be more enhanced, still in early stages from what I see on the platform.

review_title: Hevo - better features and value than the rest
description: Simple to set up - support interactions were perfect.
author: Richard G.
pros: Support is fantastic and the features are brillant
cons: Hard to convince people away from the bigger options
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Ease of ELT with Hevo Data
description: Very happy with the tool where as I mentioned that I can integrate any source data in matter of minutes
author: Ravi R.
pros: We can integrate source data into data warehouse in a matter of minutes which was unthinkable few years back. Hevo has lot of connectors that we can get source data and ingest into the data warehouse
cons: Transformation and lineage can be little better

description: It was very easy to sign up and set up Facebook to BigQuery. The user UI is easy to use and step-by-step instructions are included. You don't need a dev to get things moving as long as you're passingly familiar with Facebook and BigQuery and can read directions.
author: James Q C.
pros: I used Hevo to pipeline data from Facebook into Big Query. The service worked as expected and properly transferred my data. It was one of several services I evaluated for our data pipeline needs.
cons: I had some integration needs that HEVO did not include, so I had to go with another provider who included those. Otherwise, HEVO was amongst my top choices.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Nice product to use for data extraction and ETL
cons: No cons at the moment for Hevo based on my useage
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Swati S.
pros: Hevo is extremely user friendly and very seamless. Data pipelines can be set in a matter of a few clicks. Our business users are extremely happy with all the data at their disposal for any analysis that they need to do. Hevo's support is very prompt and always available to answer your queries.
cons: When we had started using Hevo 2 years ago, there were only a few sources available. However, I see more and more new sources getting added every month.

author: Aura Iustina P.
pros: I find Hevo easy to use and setup. I enjoy the free trial at first because it helped me understand if this is the tool we are looking for (and it was). I also appreciate their support via live chat. Didn't need it often, but when I did they were responsive and answered my questions.
cons: I like the least the fact that, when it comes to choosing a billing plan, after 5M events/monthly the next available is 20M. I find this gap too big.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Quick customer support and constantly evolving features
author: Cheshta D.
pros: As a person with little ETL experience, Hevo made the process of building pipelines from various sources seamless. When I run into any issues, their customer support team is quick to respond and usually resolves my issue on the spot. If not, they escalate the issue which also gets a quick response.
cons: Some features are a little tricky to implement at times, like manual mapping, feature transformation. But I'm usually able to get assistance from customer support.

review_title: Hevo - The best EtLT and ELT tool
description: overall my experience is good, we are ingesting data with fb ads, and google adsense, and instagram and salesforce
author: khushi K.
pros: i really like the nice and easy UI to setup pipeline, apart from it I really like their schema mapper function also the latest transformation drag and drop UI
cons: I don't like that they don't do data qc or do not provide feature to setup data quality rules like glue and databricks does
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Japkeerat S.
pros: Hevo is one of the easiest tool to get started with. Every data source we needed was present in Hevo. Pipeline setup process was also straightforward.
cons: I believe monitoring could be improved.

review_title: Good Product for large scale ETL jobs.
author: Boopathy R.
pros: Click and Select development of pipelines.
cons: Pricing of the product is higher than expected.

review_title: good for using hevo data integration
author: andy R.
pros: about tools to get asana data using pipeline
cons: this software is so powerfull and easy to operating

author: Alvin Radeka P.
pros: Hevo helps our team set up our pipeline in the most simplistic way possible
cons: The price is a bit on the expensive side, but the features they offered are good
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
